english translation text: Dua “Allahumma Man Ta’abba Wa Tahayya’a- - -” (Mafatul Jinan Pg 32)
In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O my Allah! Many a man takes pain, makes compromises
comes to terms, to draw attention of other men in hope of profit and gain
kindness and indulgence
seeking Thy favors, making a request for Thy indulgence and kindness
O Lord, I turn to for fitness and maturity
because Thou does not dismiss praying suppliant
making a request for Thy indulgence and kindness
Because Thou does not dismiss praying supplicant

arabic text: يا مَنْ لا يَخيبُ عَلَيْهِ سائِلٌ
english translation text: O He who does not send away any destitute disappointed
nor is ever at a disadvantage because of extravagance (giving with out restraint)

arabic text: فَاِنّي لَمْ آتِكَ ثِقَةً بِعَمَل صالِح عَمِلْتُهُ
english translation text: Surely I have come to Thee with no good deeds to rely upon
but I never go to others to draw their attention
I have come to Thee
bitter and sour on account of vain desires, sad and desolate
ashamed of my guilt

arabic text: وَلا عُذْرَ اَتَيْتُكَ اَرْجُو عَظيمَ عَفْوِكَ
english translation text: Without any excuse or argument I have come to Thee to make a request for Thy lenient method
Thou uses to deal with wrongdoers
because prolonged fascination
for an artificial life
does not make Thee withdraw Thy mercy
O He Who shows mercy, again and again
and forgive, ever so beyond measure

arabic text: يا عَظيمُ يا عَظيمُ يا عَظيمُ
english translation text: O The Magnificent! O The Magnificent! O The Magnificent!
Nothing turn off thy anger except Thy loving attention

arabic text: وَلا يُنْجي مِنْ سَخَطِكَ إلاَّ التَّضَرُّعُ اِلَيْكَ
english translation text: nothing keeps safe from Thy displeasure, except humble submissiveness, unto Thee
So forgive me. O my Lord and Master, free me of care and anxiety

arabic text: بِالْقُدْرَةِ الَّتي تُحْيي بِها مَيْتَ الْبِلادِ
english translation text: as Thou has the skill and mastery (even) to make barren dead ground grow green, and be fertile
and do not make me rush into deadly danger, in frustration
give answer to my call
tell me that my request has received approval

arabic text: وَاَذِقْني طَعْمَ الْعافِيَةِ إلى مُنَتَهى اَجَلي
english translation text: let me have the full used of the welfare (I am allowed), till the end of my life
Do not give my enemy a chance to laugh at me
do not give him an upper hand over me
do not let him tread on the neck of his victim (me)
O Allah! If Thou hampers my progress
who (no one) can promote my cause!

arabic text: وَاِنْ رَفَعْتَني فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذي يَضَعُني
english translation text: If Thou improves my station, who (no one) can lower my position!

arabic text: وَاِنْ اَهْلَكْتَني فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ في عَبْدِكَ
english translation text: If Thou condemns me who (no one) can speak to Thee on behalf of Thy servant
and draw Thy attention to his plight!

arabic text: وَقَدْ عَلِمْتُ اَنَّهُ لَيْسَ فى حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ
english translation text: I know for sure there is no injustice in what Thou decides upon
nor Thou punishes in a hurry
For only he makes haste, who is liable to lose the chance
or only the weak and stupid resort to highhandedness; and Thou stands high and above

arabic text: وَقَدْ تَعالَيْتَ يا اِلـهى عَنْ ذلِكَ عُلُوّاً كَبيراً
english translation text: O my Lord and Master, away from this, the sublime the Greatest
O Allah! I seek refuge with Thee
so give me asylum, I look for thy protection, so watch over me
I ask for means of livelihood, so keep up me
I rely upon Thee, so make me content
I turn to thee for help against my enemy, so support me
I run after Thy help, so stand by me
I strive for Thy forgiveness, O My Lord and Master! Forgive me.
So be it. So be it. So be it.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
